articles.author: Margaret  Brennan
articles.title: European allies say Russia is helping Iran more than the U.S. has acknowledged, sources say - CBS News
articles.description: The Europeans also argue that the war in Ukraine is intertwined with the war in Iran due to the cooperation between Russia and Iran.
articles.content: European allies are publicly and privately telling American diplomats that Russia is directly and materially helping Iran's war efforts beyond what the U.S. will publicly acknowledge, sources tell CB… [+4387 chars]
